name: lorenzos-claude-code
description: Minimal Claude Code plugin for Next.js + React + Supabase. 18 commands, 6 agents, 10 skills, 9 hooks. Beat the competition with circuit-breaker, verification-first, and micro-tasking.

commands.name: api-new
commands.description: Create a new Next.js API route with validation, error handling, and TypeScript

commands.name: api-test
commands.description: Test API endpoints with automated test generation

commands.name: automerge
commands.description: PR automation - validate, merge, cleanup, and sync

commands.name: component-new
commands.description: Create a new React component with TypeScript and modern best practices

commands.name: edge-function-new
commands.description: Create a new Supabase Edge Function with Deno

commands.name: fixissue
commands.description: End-to-end issue resolution - fetch, branch, fix, test, commit, PR, close

commands.name: hook-new
commands.description: Create custom React hooks with TypeScript and best practices

commands.name: lint
commands.description: Run linting and fix code quality issues

commands.name: page-new
commands.description: Create a new Next.js page with App Router best practices

commands.name: review
commands.description: RIPER Review Phase - Quality gates before considering work complete

commands.name: test-new
commands.description: Generate test files for Jest, Vitest, or Playwright

commands.name: types-gen
commands.description: Generate TypeScript types from Supabase database schema

commands.name: verify
commands.description: Run comprehensive 6-phase verification loop (build, types, lint, tests, security, diff)

agents.name: backend-architect
agents.description: Design reliable backend systems with focus on data integrity, security, and fault tolerance

agents.name: build-error-resolver
agents.description: Use when fixing TypeScript errors, build failures, compilation issues, type mismatches, or "tsc --noEmit" errors. Activates on build failures, type errors, or compilation problems requiring quick minimal fixes.

agents.name: code-reviewer
agents.description: Use this agent when reviewing code for quality, performing PR reviews, or analyzing code for security vulnerabilities, performance issues, or style problems. Activates on code review requests or quality assessments.

agents.name: devops-engineer
agents.description: Design CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure as code, and deployment strategies for reliable software delivery

agents.name: frontend-architect
agents.description: Create accessible, performant user interfaces with focus on user experience and modern frameworks

agents.name: test-strategist
agents.description: Use this agent when planning test strategies, analyzing test coverage, or designing comprehensive testing approaches. Activates on test planning, coverage analysis, or when asking about what to test.

skills.name: api-development
skills.description: WHEN to auto-invoke: Creating API routes, building endpoints, adding route.ts files, implementing REST/GraphQL APIs, adding authentication to APIs, rate limiting, API validation with Zod, handling HTTP methods (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE).

skills.name: database-operations
skills.description: WHEN to auto-invoke: Database schema design, creating migrations, writing SQL queries, query optimization, Supabase operations, Prisma/Drizzle schema changes, PostgreSQL tasks, RLS policies, indexes.

skills.name: frontend-development
skills.description: WHEN to auto-invoke: Creating UI components, building React/Vue/Svelte components, Next.js pages, styling with Tailwind/CSS, state management setup, form handling, accessibility improvements, client-side interactivity.
